project.name: SylphxAI Actions
project.summary: Shared GitHub Actions repository for reusable automation consumed by SylphxAI repositories through versioned action references.
goals: Provide shared, versioned GitHub Action surfaces for SylphxAI repositories.
Maintain the Slack notification composite action in slack-notify/action.yml.
Keep action ownership, public surfaces, and adoption gaps explicit for agents.
nonGoals: Own repository-specific CI, release, or deployment workflows.
Own organization reusable workflows that belong in SylphxAI/.github.
Own enterprise engineering doctrine, standards, or project manifest schema.

owns.name: shared-github-actions
owns.description: Reusable GitHub Action implementations and their versioned public action references.

owns.name: slack-notify-action
owns.description: Composite action that sends a Slack message to a supplied webhook.

doesNotOwn: Repository-specific CI, release, deployment, or preview workflows.
Organization reusable workflows owned by SylphxAI/.github.
Enterprise doctrine and manifest schema owned by SylphxAI/doctrine.

allowedDependencies.surface: project manifest schema and engineering doctrine

forbiddenCouplings: Do not add product-specific workflow behavior to shared actions.
Do not make consuming repositories depend on private files outside documented action paths.
Do not fork doctrine standards into this repository.

delivery.deployPath: Consumers reference action paths through Git refs such as v1; there is no separate runtime deploy for this repository.
delivery.productionProof: GitHub main/tag readback, action metadata validation, and successful downstream consumer workflow runs.

gaps.description: README documents a publish action path that is not present on main; align README, restore the action, or move publish ownership to SylphxAI/.github.
gaps.target: Open a follow-up action-surface freshness PR after manifest rollout.

gaps.description: No repository-local CI currently validates composite action metadata or README/action surface freshness.
gaps.target: Adopt an action metadata and doc-surface validation gate before the next action contract change.
